news.headline: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) integrates AI Agents into SDLC to enhance development. AI Agents assist in product definition, backend prototyping, and application design to streamline processes and accelerate AI adoption across industries.
news.summary: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) has integrated AI Agents into its software development life cycle to enhance development capabilities. These AI Agents, supervised by human intelligence, are meant to optimize solutions and support various industries in accelerating AI adoption. They work alongside Globant's existing AI products, such as Augoor, MagnifAI, and Navigate, to provide a comprehensive suite of AI-driven solutions. The company has introduced several AI Agents for the SDLC process: Product Definition AI Agent streamlines product definition, Backend Prototyping AI Agent simplifies backend development, and Application Design AI Agent converts concepts into reality. These agents aim to make software development more efficient. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Urban Outfitters' URBN shows strong Q1 results; FP Movement grows 25%, Free People's wholesale up 6%. Nuuly adds 50K subscribers, totaling 244K active. Sustaining growth through strategic retail expansion and innovation.
news.summary: Urban Outfitters Inc. is positioned for long-term growth with key initiatives like FP Movement and Nuuly driving success. In the first quarter of fiscal 2025, the company reported strong performance, with FP Movement showing 25% growth in retail segment and plans for expansion. Free People's wholesale segment saw a 6% year-over-year sales increase. Nuuly, the rental business, added over 50,000 new subscribers compared to the previous quarter, reaching over 244,000 active subscribers by the end of the quarter. URBN's focus on consumer engagement, retail expansion, and sustainability reaffirms its commitment to success in the market.

news.headline: Research firm 10x warns Bitcoin could drop to $55,000 due to 10 factors including trend indicators and political uncertainty.
news.summary: Research firm 10x Research has issued a warning about a potential Bitcoin downturn to $55,000, based on ten key factors outlined in their report. The firm notes that Bitcoin entered a downtrend on June 20, following a trend model favored by institutional investors. This trend may lead to increased short positions by trend-following funds like Commodity Trading Advisors (CTAs), particularly due to the currently low volatility environment. Weekly and monthly reversal indicators also point towards a broader correction, with the weekly Relative Strength Index declining since early March despite Bitcoin's value remaining above $60,000. The monthly Stochastic oscillator is displaying patterns similar to previous multi-month peaks in early 2018 and mid-2021. Additionally, political factors, such as the recent Presidential Debate, are contributing to market uncertainty, with potential implications for future crypto regulations in the US.

news.headline: Rite Aid reduces $2 billion debt through bankruptcy, closes stores, and sells Elixir; $750 million loss in 2023.
news.summary: A U.S. bankruptcy judge has given the green light to Rite Aid Corp’s restructuring proposal. This move will enable the pharmacy chain to slash its debt by $2 billion and hand over control to a consortium of lenders. Rite Aid entered Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings in October 2023 after facing a challenging fiscal year with losses amounting to $750 million and revenue hitting $24 billion. Throughout the bankruptcy process, Rite Aid shuttered several stores, divested its pharmacy benefit firm Elixir, and reached agreements with various creditors, such as McKesson Corp and other lenders. The restructuring efforts rescued the company from potential closure, sparing its operations. Additionally, the restructuring scheme earmarked $47.5 million for junior creditors, comprising individuals and local governments that had taken legal action against Rite Aid for its alleged involvement.

news.headline: Belém to host COP 30, a test for Amazon cities in safeguarding the rainforest, as reported by CityLab.
news.summary: An updated report states that approximately 3,500 people have been affected by the recent flooding in the region. This number includes individuals who have been displaced from their homes and are currently residing in temporary shelters. Additionally, over 500 homes have been damaged due to the floodwaters, with estimated repair costs amounting to $2.5 million. Local authorities are continuing rescue and relief efforts to assist those impacted by the disaster.

news.headline: Urban Land Institute names Angela Cain as Global CEO effective Sept 3, 2024, with over 25 years of experience.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Angela Cain was appointed as the new global chief executive officer of the Urban Land Institute (ULI). She is set to assume her role on September 3, 2024. With over 25 years of experience in global non-profit work and corporate real estate leadership, Cain's appointment marks a significant development for the organization.

news.headline: Entropik introduces AI-Generated Reports on Decode and Qatalyst platforms, revolutionizing research reporting with generative AI.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, Entropik has introduced a new feature on their Decode and Qatalyst platforms, called AI-Generated Reports. This update aims to enhance the platforms by utilizing artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: FirstEnergy Corp (NYSE: FE) to release Q2 2024 financial results on July 30. Management to hold conference call.
news.summary: FirstEnergy Corp., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol FE, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter and first half of the year 2024 on Tuesday, July 30. This information will be made public after the markets close in Akron, Ohio. The disclosure will be followed by a conference call led by FirstEnergy management to analyze and delve into the results. This upcoming report will be crucial for investors and analysts to gauge the company's progress in the current financial year.

news.headline: Varnish Software partners with Atomicorp to enhance web content delivery security with Varnish Enterprise WAF solution.
news.summary: Varnish Software, a prominent provider of content delivery software solutions, has announced its collaboration with Atomicorp for web application security. This partnership will incorporate Atomicorp's security rules into Varnish Enterprise WAF solution. The joint effort between the two companies will enhance the security features of Varnish Enterprise WAF. This development was officially disclosed on July 1, 2024, at locations in Los Angeles and Chantilly, VA. The integration of Atomicorp's web application security rules is expected to bolster the protection offered by Varnish Software's WAF solution, ensuring better safeguarding against potential threats.

news.headline: Company XXX has announced buyback of 500,000 outstanding shares. Transaction is part of $10 million share repurchase program.
Chetu achieves its 14th consecutive Type 2 SOC 1® certification for Service Organizations, a significant milestone.
news.summary: Chetu, based in Sunrise, Florida, has recently achieved its 14th consecutive accreditation for System and Organization Controls for Service Organizations' ICFR Type 2 SOC 1®. This accreditation demonstrates Chetu's commitment to maintaining high standards in its services.

news.headline: Sectigo receives 23-24 WebTrust audit, remains compliant with CA/Browser Forum requirements.
news.summary: Sectigo, a leading provider of certificate lifecycle management, has successfully completed its annual WebTrust audit in Scottsdale, Ariz. CEO Kevin Weiss confirmed the achievement, emphasizing Sectigo's role as custodians of digital trust. The company serves hundreds of thousands of customers, including global enterprises, ensuring the security of their networks. This announcement underscores Sectigo's dedication to maintaining high standards in digital security.

news.headline: Scott Speed will join Travis Pastrana and Subaru at 2024 Goodwood Festival of Speed in West Sussex, England - July 1, 2024.
news.summary: In July 1, 2024, in West Sussex, England, Travis Pastrana, a renowned figure known for his exceptional performance in Gymkhana 2022 and remarkable displays at Goodwood's 2022 and 2023 Shootout Hillclimbs, along with the Subaru Family Huckster, is set to captivate audiences once again at the Goodwood event. The return of this iconic duo is anticipated to draw in large crowds and keep spectators on the edge of their seats with their daring stunts and spectacular drives.

news.headline: Inventor from Chestertown, Md develops the GREENE INVENTION, a modified crossbow cocking device to reduce strain.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Chestertown, Maryland, shared their innovative creation - the GREENE INVENTION. The inventor noticed a need for a more efficient and effortless method to cock a crossbow and thus developed this groundbreaking design. The invention aims to alleviate challenges and lessen physical strain on the user's back, shoulders, and arms. Its unique features promise a smoother experience in handling crossbows.

news.headline: Disney Vacation Club opens new cabins at Fort Wilderness Resort, blending wilderness with Disney magic.
news.summary: Disney Vacation Club recently unveiled a collection of newly designed cabins in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. Embracing the beauty of the wilderness and the enchantment of Disney, these cabins offer a unique backdrop for unforgettable vacation memories. The first phase of these cabins was opened on July 1, 2024. This development marks an exciting addition to Disney Vacation Club's offerings, providing guests with a magical experience in the heart of nature.

news.headline: New Chick-fil-A summer merchandise collection includes Waffle Fry Pool Float, Pickle Pickle™ Pickleball Set, Chicken Sandwich Towel, and more. Released on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A recently unveiled e-commerce store showcases popular fan-favorite items such as the Waffle Fry Pool Float, Pickle Pickle™ Pickleball Set, and Chicken Sandwich Towel. The shop debuted on July 1, 2024, in Atlanta. Some of the unique products available include a playful twist on traditional games and food-themed beach accessories. The store presents a variety of must-have items that cater to diverse interests, appealing to a broad range of customers. Whether customers desire a quirky pickleball experience or envision relaxing on a food-inspired pool float, this online shop offers something for everyone. Explore the collection today and add a touch of fun and novelty to your summer activities.

news.headline: Crocs (NASDAQ: CROX) sees strong demand trends with 16th consecutive quarter of earnings beat. Shares rose 24.7% in past year. Sales and earnings show growth of 4.4% and 5.6% respectively from year-ago numbers.
news.summary: Crocs Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) is poised for long-term growth, with a solid business strategy supported by strong consumer demand for its Crocs and HEYDUDE brands. The company reported impressive results in the first quarter of 2024, marking the 16th consecutive quarter of earnings beat. Despite challenges like rising costs from HEYDUDE acquisition and distribution inefficiencies, Crocs remains confident in its strategies and investments. CROX shares rose 24.7% in the past year, outperforming the industry's decline of 7.7%. The Zacks Rank #2 company is expected to see a 4.4% sales and 5.6% earnings growth in the current financial year. This performance underscores Crocs' strength in the footwear sector compared to industry and S&P 500 growth rates.

news.headline: EMA accepts AstraZeneca's marketing application for COVID-19 prevention drug sipavibart for immunocompromised patients.
news.summary: AstraZeneca Plc's (NASDAQ: AZN) marketing authorization application for sipavibart, a long-acting antibody for COVID-19 prevention in immunocompromised patients, has been accepted by the European Medicines Agency (EMA). The application, submitted for pre-exposure prophylaxis, underwent an accelerated assessment procedure. Sipavibart aims to provide protection for immunocompromised individuals resistant to vaccination and at high risk of severe COVID-19 complications. AstraZeneca has set an ambitious target of reaching $80 billion in total revenue by 2030 through pipeline expansion efforts. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Axway named a Leader in API Management Software by Forrester. Report published on July 1, 2024. Chief Product Officer expresses gratitude for customer success.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Axway (Euronext: AXW.PA), a prominent API management and integration software provider, has achieved the status of a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: API Management Software, Q3 2024 report released on July 1, 2024¹. Vince Padua, Chief Product Officer at Axway, expressed gratitude for the recognition, stating that the company is dedicated to ensuring customer success by delivering the necessary expertise and support. This recognition solidifies Axway's position in the industry.

news.headline: Circle obtains first stablecoin license in EU as MiCA crypto regulations take effect, navigating Europe's new framework.
news.summary: With Europe's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework now in effect, the USDC issuer Circle has successfully obtained the first stablecoin license in the European Union.

news.headline: New from Composability Labs: Spark, a fast onchain CLOB leveraging Polygon (MATIC) Miden for DeFi efficiency. Click for details!
news.summary: Composability Labs has launched Spark, a cutting-edge central limit order book (CLOB) that makes use of Polygon's (MATIC) Miden state-minimization capabilities. This innovative technology aims to improve efficiency in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector.

news.headline: EptivA and Infopoly Ltd. collaborate to launch Pain Cloud®, addressing the unmet needs of 1.5 billion chronic pain sufferers globally.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on July 1, 2024, it was reported that the most recent chronic pain medication was authorized by regulators ten years ago. Despite 1.5 billion individuals globally enduring chronic pain presently, there has been a notable absence of new pain medications. The obstacles encountered in the research and development of pain treatments have made it a pressing issue in the medical field.

news.headline: Robinhood acquired Pluto Capital to enhance AI investment tools; Pluto uses advanced data analysis for personalized strategies.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) recently revealed its acquisition of Pluto Capital Inc., an AI-powered investment research platform. This strategic decision is intended to enhance Robinhood's offerings by incorporating AI-driven tools and personalized strategies for its customers. Pluto Capital Inc. is recognized for its sophisticated data analysis and tailored investment approaches. Their technology utilizes large language models (LLMs) to analyze and understand real-time personal and global financial data, facilitating prompt recognition of market trends and opportunities. This move showcases Robinhood's commitment to providing innovative solutions in the investment landscape.

news.headline: Snap and Samba TV research shows Snapchat campaigns drive 84% increase in TV show and movie viewership.
news.summary: In San Francisco on July 01, 2024, Snap and Samba TV unveiled research findings demonstrating the efficacy of Snapchat campaigns in driving audiences towards new shows and movies. The study, based on Snapchat's base of over 800 million monthly active users, revealed that campaigns on the platform effectively led to increased viewership post-ad exposure. The comprehensive analysis encompassed various factors such as viewership timings, advertiser types, genres, and seasons. Through a blend of Samba TV's Causal Attribution, Snap's Intent to Treat control, and Samba TV's ACR data, the research accurately gauged the real incremental viewership uplift. The research data displayed an average of 84% rise in viewership for audiences encountering Snapchat ads.

news.headline: Kasada named Strong Performer by Forrester in Bot Management Software report; evaluated among 11 providers based on 24 criteria.
news.summary: In a recent report by Forrester Research, Inc., Kasada, a company known for its innovative approach to combating automated threats by focusing on the humans behind them, was recognized as a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Bot Management Software, Q3 2024. The evaluation included 11 significant bot management providers and was based on 24 criteria covering aspects like current offerings, strategies, and market presence. Kasada secured the second-highest score among the providers assessed.

news.headline: Trump Organization secures deal for a new high-rise tower in Jeddah, part of its multiple Middle East projects.
news.summary: The recently announced residential high-rise tower in Jeddah is part of a series of projects planned by the company owned by the former president in the Middle East region. This tower is one of the latest additions to the company's portfolio and reflects its ongoing commitment to expanding its presence in the region. The construction of the tower is expected to cost around \$150 million and will offer luxury living spaces in a prime location in Jeddah. The company's expansion into the Middle East market underscores its strategic growth initiatives and its focus on capitalizing on emerging opportunities in the region's real estate sector.

news.headline: Jenny Carlson named new director by AARP Ohio, with over three decades of experience in government and education.
news.summary: Jenny Carlson, a veteran leader with more than 30 years of experience in federal and state government and education, has been appointed to key positions at the Ohio Department of Aging and The Ohio State University Office of Health Sciences. Based in Columbus, Ohio, Carlson brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to her new roles.

news.headline: Inventor from Delaware creates AIR COMMANDER HUMP to automate adjusting landing gear legs on semi-trailers.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Felton, Del., shared his inspiration for creating the AIR COMMANDER HUMP. As a truck driver, he found manually adjusting dollies and landing gear legs on semi-trailers to be a cumbersome task. Motivated by this experience, he innovated the AIR COMMANDER HUMP to address this issue.

news.headline: BTC mining stocks like MARA, RIOT, and CLSK rise as Bitcoin rebounds. BTC up 2% in 24 hours after 10% dip in a month.
news.summary: Bitcoin mining stocks such as Marathon Digital Holdings Inc (MARA), Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT), and CleanSpark Inc (CLSK) are experiencing an increase in trading on Monday as Bitcoin is recovering from recent lows. Bitcoin has risen by over 2% in the last 24 hours, rebounding slightly after a 10% decline in the past month. This uptrend is contributing to the overall strength in the cryptocurrency market and related stocks. The rise in Bitcoin's value at the beginning of the week may be influenced by spot ETF performance. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Take advantage of a special offer by Checkers & Rally's this National French Fry Day from July 12th to July 14th in Tampa, Florida. Checkers & Rally's, renowned for their delicious and affordable menu options, is inviting fry enthusiasts to enjoy this promotion.

news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced gains today amidst a mixed performance in the stock market. Boeing saw a significant rise following a merger agreement, while Chewy's stock value increased due to a move by Roaring Kitty. However, Nvidia faced a decline after receiving a negative assessment from Wall Street. This live coverage highlights the fluctuating market trends, with the Dow Jones up but Nvidia struggling, and Chewy being positively impacted by Roaring Kitty's actions.

news.headline: Vontobel buys minority stake in London infrastructure firm Ancala.
news.summary: In Zurich, Vontobel has successfully acquired a substantial minority share in Ancala, a private infrastructure manager headquartered in London.

news.headline: Invesco closed-end funds raise distribution rates for all investment-grade municipal bond closed-end funds, dividends declared.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Board of Trustees for various Invesco closed-end funds announced dividends. The ex-date for these dividends is set for July 16, 2024, with both record and reinvest dates falling on the same day. Shareholders can anticipate payment on July 31, 2024. This announcement applies to multiple closed-end management investment companies under Invesco, with details of specific tickers and monthly dividend amounts undisclosed.

news.headline: Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust declare dividends on July 1, 2024. Payable on 7/16/2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Board of Trustees for Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust announced dividends for each Fund. The dividends are set to be paid on July 16, 2024, to shareholders as of the record date. The reinvestment date is also the same as the payable date.

news.headline: Inventor from Maryland creates ONE STEP CAULKING TAPE for applying caulking compounds to make straight, consistent lines.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Forrest Hill, Md shared his inspiration behind creating the ONE STEP CAULKING TAPE. Seeking to aid in the application of caulking compounds for straight, consistent lines, the inventor developed this rolled tape product. The innovative product aims to eliminate common challenges during caulking, improving efficiency.

Whistle Express Car Wash acquires Fins Car Wash, adding 15 locations in the Carolinas. Doubles brand presence in key markets.

This strategic move involves rebranding Fins Car Wash's 15 locations under the Whistle Express name. As a result, the brand's footprint in South Carolina's Greenville-Spartanburg and Charleston markets, alongside North Carolina's Triad, Raleigh, and Wilmington regions, will witness more than a two-fold increase. This acquisition will significantly bolster Whistle Express's presence in the region.

news.headline: DDN AI400X2 Turbo wins 2024 AI Breakthrough Award for accelerating Generative AI and large language model adoption.
news.summary: The DDN AI400X2 Turbo has been recognized in a globally renowned annual awards program for its role in driving the adoption of generative AI and large language models. DDN®, a top player in artificial intelligence (AI) and multi-cloud data management solutions, has proven its expertise in this field.
